rule: a default namespace (xmlns=) that is visibly utilized by an unprefixed element is retained under Exclusive C14N
provenance: derived from W3C Exclusive XML Canonicalization 1.0 REC (xml-exc-c14n-20020718) §2 visibly-utilized-namespace rule applied to the default namespace; expected output computed by hand from the spec rule, not from a third-party tool.
